org.apache.dubbo.config.support

注释类型 Parameter


  • @Documented
 @Retention(value=RUNTIME)
 @Target(value=METHOD)
public @interface Parameter
    Parameter

    • 可选元素概要

      可选元素 
      限定符和类型 可选元素和说明
      boolean append 
      boolean attribute 
      boolean escaped 
      boolean excluded 
      String key 
      boolean required 
      boolean useKeyAsProperty
      if key() is specified, it will be used as the key for the annotated property when generating url.

    • 元素详细资料

      • key

        public abstract String key
        默认值:
        ""

      • required

        public abstract boolean required
        默认值:
        false

      • excluded

        public abstract boolean excluded
        默认值:
        false

      • escaped

        public abstract boolean escaped
        默认值:
        false

      • attribute

        public abstract boolean attribute
        默认值:
        false

      • append

        public abstract boolean append
        默认值:
        false

      • useKeyAsProperty

        public abstract boolean useKeyAsProperty
        if key() is specified, it will be used as the key for the annotated property when generating url. by default, this key will also be used to retrieve the config value: 
         {@code
  class ExampleConfig {
      // Dubbo will try to get "dubbo.example.alias_for_item=xxx" from .properties, if you want to use the original property
      // "dubbo.example.item=xxx", you need to set useKeyAsProperty=false.
        默认值:
        true
